job_title: Software Engineer II, Backend Full Stack - Financial Product
job_nlp_title: Software Engineer II, Backend Full Stack - Financial Product
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full-stack development, Backend development, API development, Python, Go
skill_match_scores: Full-stack development:0.0, Backend development:1.0, API development:1.0, Python:1.0, Go:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of professional experience with a focus on full-stack development, demonstrating the ability to deliver reliable, end-to-end products using a backend language (e.g., Python/Go) and frontend technologies like React/TypeScript, Prioritize projects based on business impact, ensuring high-quality implementation without unnecessary complexity, Ability to thrive in dynamic environments, quickly switching context between frontend and backend work as needed to accelerate delivery, Excellent skills in communicating technical trade-offs across the stack with clarity and precision to both frontend and backend partners
core_responsibilities: Design and implement features with an emphasis on backend logic, API development, and data integrity, while also contributing to the frontend implementation, Work across the stack, focusing on API design, event modeling, and robust data management while ensuring a seamless connection to the user interface, Own the full development lifecycle for features, ensuring that the backend architecture supports both reliable functionality and excellent frontend performance, Work closely with cross-functional partners to understand requirements, refine technical scope, and drive successful, reliable feature delivery
job_summary: Rippling is a company that integrates HR, IT, and Finance systems for businesses. They are seeking a Software Engineer II to design and implement features with a focus on backend logic and API development, while also contributing to frontend implementation across their financial product offerings.
